title: cyperus ruwenzoriensis
intro: Cyperus ruwenzoriensis, also known as the Ruwenzori flatsedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family, native to the mountainous regions of East Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizomes, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Cyperus ruwenzoriensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and help with wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including skin infections and gastrointestinal issues.
